title: Community Workbench SDK
description: The Community Workbench SDK provides developers and advanced researchers with programmatic tools to build, extend, and integrate custom analytical modules within the Parthenon platform. The SDK enables the creation of reusable study components and facilitates contribution to the broader research community.
tips: Review the SDK reference documentation before starting development to understand the available extension points and API contracts.
Package custom modules with explicit dependency declarations to ensure portability across different Parthenon deployments.
Test custom modules against a representative dataset in a non-production environment before publishing to the community workbench.
Follow the platform's versioning conventions when releasing SDK extensions to maintain backward compatibility.
